donate_invoice_desc: Donate {amount} Telegram Stars to support the bot development.
donate_stars_select_text:
⭐ **Select Amount**

How many Telegram Stars would you like to donate?
donate_text:
💖 **Support {bot_name}**

Your donations help keep this bot running and support future development. Choose a method below to contribute:
donate_thanks:
🙏 **Thank You!**

Your donation of {amount} {currency} has been received. It means a lot!
err_already_exists: ❌ **Destination Conflict**: This channel is already configured as a target.
err_bot_left: ⛔ **Bot Inactive**: The bot was removed from this channel. Please re-add it as an administrator.
err_circular_forward: ❌ **Circular Forwarding**: A loop was detected. This channel cannot forward back to itself or its source chain.
err_limit_reached: ❌ **Quota Reached**: You can configure up to 3 destinations for each source channel.
err_no_admin: ⛔ **Permission Refused**: You must be a **Channel Administrator** to manage these settings.
err_no_channels: ❌ **No Source Channels**: You haven't connected any source channels to the system yet.
err_only_in_chat: ❌ **Context Required**: This command must be sent directly inside the channel or group you wish to configure.
err_self_forward: ❌ **Invalid Route**: A channel cannot forward messages to itself. Please select a different target.
menu_channels:
📋 **Managed Channels** ({count})
Select a source channel to configure its mirroring rules:
menu_forwarding:
📤 **Mirroring Controls: {title}**

Content from this channel can be automatically mirrored to up to **3 destinations**. Add targets below or configure real-time translation.
menu_main:
⚙️ **Channel Configuration: {title}**

This is your source channel dashboard. Manage forwarding status, connected destinations, and custom signatures here.
menu_select_translation_lang:
🌍 **Select Translation Target**

Choose the destination language. All messages forwarded to this target will be translated automatically.
menu_user_dashboard:
👋 **User Dashboard**

Welcome back! Manage your connected channels and global interface preferences here.
msg_add_bot_help:
🚀 **How to Connect a Channel**

1. Add this bot to your channel as an **Administrator**.
2. Ensure it has 'Post Messages' permissions.
3. Post any content in that channel.
4. It will be automatically detected and appear in your Dashboard!
msg_add_dest:
🎯 **Add Destination**

Select a target channel from the list below. (Note: You must also be an administrator of the destination channel).
msg_added: ✅ **Success**: {title} has been connected as a destination.
msg_credit_set: ✅ **Success**: Your custom signature has been updated.
msg_left_channel: 👋 **Disconnected**: The bot has left the channel and all local settings have been purged.
msg_set_credit:
💳 **Signature Setup**

Send the text you want to append to every forwarded message. Ideal for branding or source links! (Send /cancel to discard).
mychannels_desc: List of source channels where the bot is currently active:
select_language:
🌍 **Language Preferences**
Select your preferred interface language for menus and buttons:
welcome_start:
👋 **Welcome to {bot_name}!**

I specialize in mirroring content across your Telegram channels with **automated translation** and customizable signatures. Let's start by choosing your language:
